## What's Changed

- Reworked Tube TV HLS generation so each scheduled video or commercial is segmented independently instead of relying on one fragile continuous concat job.
- Shortened the live HLS playlist window so players tune closer to the current channel timeline.
- Added Tube TV playback events to server Activity so channel streams show alongside Local and NZB playback history.
- Improved Activity stats with timeline position, bytes sent, and hardware/software transcoding details.
- Added tests for Tube TV HLS item failure handling, live playlist window behavior, and playback history coalescing.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```
